title: RMS Kart Racer Metal Construction Set - Build & Play Kit for Kids - Includes Tools - STEM Educational Toy - DIY Engineering Kit - Box Size 20x20x4.5 cm - R02-0085
features: STEM Educational Toy – Encourage hands-on learning with this RMS Kart Racer Metal Construction Set, designed to teach kids about engineering, problem-solving, and creativity.
Complete Build & Play Kit – Comes with all the essential tools and metal pieces needed to construct your own kart racer, offering hours of engaging and productive fun.
Durable & High-Quality Materials – Made from sturdy metal components to ensure durability and long-lasting use for young builders.
Ideal for Kids & Beginners – Perfect for children who enjoy building and construction toys, promoting motor skills development and teamwork.
Compact & Portable Design – The set comes in a compact box (20x20x4.5 cm), making it easy to store or take on the go for creative play anytime, anywhere.
description: Product description Unleash your child’s creativity with the RMS Kart Racer Metal Construction Set! This STEM educational toy allows kids to build their own kart racer using high-quality metal pieces and tools included in the kit. It’s perfect for fostering problem-solving skills, hand-eye coordination, and creativity, offering endless hours of hands-on fun. Ideal for beginners and aspiring engineers, this compact set (20x20x4.5 cm) is great for at-home play or on the go! Safety Warning No Applicable
